# ⚠️ RETIRED — DO NOT USE

This skill described the old Content Producer Paperclip agent workflow.

**Replaced by:** `content-research-pipeline` (V2 — zero-token pipeline using NotebookLM)

The new pipeline generates thread drafts and infographics via NotebookLM MCP tools (free), not LLM agents. See `content-research-pipeline` for the current architecture.
